output.summary: Added 'related' mode to postsSource attribute. In 'related' mode, the block queries posts that share taxonomy terms with the current post being viewed. Includes configurable fallback behavior and non-singular page handling per orchestrator guidance.

changes: Added relatedFallbackToLatest attribute (boolean, default true) - controls fallback to latest posts when no related posts found
Added relatedNonSingularBehavior attribute (string enum ['hide', 'latest'], default 'hide') - controls behavior on homepage/archives per user decision on DEC-010
Updated DynamicContentCarouselAttributes type to include relatedFallbackToLatest and relatedNonSingularBehavior
Added 'Related' option to Selection Mode toggle group
Added related mode controls section with Notice explaining behavior, postsLimit control, hideIfEmpty toggle, fallback toggle, and non-singular behavior toggle
Fixed pre-existing lint error: added id prop to BaseControl and refactored nested ternary in onChange handler
Added complete @var docblock for all attributes including new related mode attributes
Implemented related posts query logic: detects current post ID, collects terms from all configured taxonomies for the post type, builds tax_query with OR relation
Handles fallback to latest posts when relatedFallbackToLatest is true and no related posts exist
Handles non-singular context (homepage/archives) based on relatedNonSingularBehavior: 'hide' shows nothing, 'latest' falls back to latest posts
Excludes current post from results via post__not_in
Refactored automatic mode into separate elseif branch for clarity

implementationNotes: Related mode uses all taxonomies configured for the post type (from taxonomy_filters config) with OR relation for maximum relatedness matching
On singular pages with no shared taxonomy terms, fallback behavior is controlled by relatedFallbackToLatest attribute
On non-singular pages (homepage, archives), behavior is controlled by relatedNonSingularBehavior attribute per orchestrator guidance on DEC-010
Current post is always excluded from results when in related mode
Editor preview via FilteredServerSideRender works automatically - PHP handles the query logic
Fixed pre-existing lint error in manual mode BaseControl (missing id prop) and nested ternary expression

relatedMode: Informational Notice explaining automatic taxonomy matching
Number of items to display (postsLimit RangeControl)
Fall back to latest posts toggle (relatedFallbackToLatest)
Behavior on non-singular pages toggle (relatedNonSingularBehavior: hide/latest)

phpQueryLogic.singularContext: Queries posts sharing ANY taxonomy terms with current post using OR relation, excludes current post, falls back to latest if enabled and no matches found
phpQueryLogic.nonSingularContext: If relatedNonSingularBehavior is 'hide', shows nothing. If 'latest', falls back to latest posts of the selected type
phpQueryLogic.taxonomyMapping: Uses taxonomy_filters config per post type: post→category, team_member→department, resource→audience+resource_type, policy→policy_topic
